news.summary: Patrowl, a leading provider of pen testing-as-a-service and Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM), has revealed the opening of its new London office and its involvement in Big SASIG 2025 on May 8th. The award-winning French company is known for its accurate threat analysis and practical remediation suggestions. Patrowl's platform is designed to monitor online assets consistently, offering reliable insights while minimizing false positives.
news.headline: Patrowl opens London office, known for pen testing & CTEM, to participate in Big SASIG 2025. French platform offers precise threat analysis.

news.summary: In San Diego, Wrike, an intelligent work management platform, revealed the incorporation of Klaxoon, the top visual collaboration suite, into its platform only 70 days post-acquisition. This integration smoothly merges Klaxoon into Wrike's AI-fueled work management system, combining sophisticated whiteboarding, interactive workshops, workflow execution, and project management into a cohesive experience. This partnership equips teams to enhance their productivity and collaboration seamlessly.
news.headline: Wrike integrates Klaxoon, visual collab suite within 70 days of acquisition, offering new whiteboarding features.

news.summary: The economy grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of a 2.9% increase. The unemployment rate fell to 4.2%, the lowest in five years. The stock market also saw gains, with the main index rising by 2.5% to reach a record high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute the positive trends to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. This marks a significant turnaround from previous quarters, signaling a strong recovery for the economy.
news.headline: Taiwan plans to triple US LNG imports to reduce tariffs.
China to support foreign companies to increase domestic sales

news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan, a recent report from TrendForce highlighted the resilience of Ford and Honda in the face of tariffs, thanks to their robust production facilities in the US. The report emphasizes the importance for all automotive companies to enhance their American presence. This strategic move is crucial in mitigating the effects of tariffs on the industry. Trends suggest that increasing US content across the board will be key for automakers to navigate the current market challenges effectively.
news.headline: Ford and Honda's US production bases offset tariff impact; TrendForce urges automakers to increase US content.

news.summary: The emirate of Sharjah in the United Arab Emirates is emerging as a key player in global food security and sustainability by cultivating a groundbreaking wheat variety with a record-breaking protein content of 19.3%. This innovative achievement places Sharjah at the forefront of the industry, attracting attention from international food corporations. As a result, Sharjah is exploring opportunities to export its high-protein wheat, aiming to establish itself as a significant player in the global market. This milestone underscores Sharjah's commitment to advancing agricultural innovation and addressing pressing food security challenges on a global scale.
news.headline: Sharjah sets global record with 19.3% protein content in wheat, attracting interest from food industry.

news.summary: In Viana do Castelo, Portugal and Dublin, Gazelle Wind Power has reached a key milestone in its renewable energy efforts. They have recently secured a 10-year TUPEM (Titulo de Utilizacao Privativa do Espaco Marítimo) authorization for their 2 MW Nau Azul floating wind demonstrator project near Aguçadoura, Portugal. This approval paves the way for the deployment of Gazelle's advanced floating offshore wind technology, designed to tap into deep-water wind resources.
news.headline: Gazelle Wind Power gets TUPEM approval for 2MW floating wind project off Aguçadoura, Portugal; aims to harness deep-sea wind.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, JMGO, a prominent company specializing in cutting-edge projection technology, announced the launch of two new models: N1S SE and N1S Nano. These models made their debut in Europe and target a wide range of entertainment preferences. They aim to blend top-notch cinematic experiences with portability, providing users with versatile entertainment options.
news.headline: JMGO introduces N1S SE & N1S Nano projectors in Europe, aiming to redefine affordable home entertainment with innovative technology.

news.summary: Nokia, alongside Digita and CoreGo, have joined hands to improve customer experience at major events. This collaboration aims to enhance connectivity by utilizing Nokia's advanced technologies. The partnership intends to cater to large gatherings by boosting network capacity, ensuring a seamless experience for attendees. This collaboration is set to elevate the quality of service at events accommodating a significant number of people.
news.headline: Nokia, Digita, and CoreGo team up to improve customer experience at events.

news.summary: A new Tech Errors and Omissions insurance is being offered to customers whose revenue exceeds £50 million or €25 million. This is in response to 72% of small and medium-sized enterprises expressing that business interruption is their primary worry. Cyber risk solutions are now accessible to businesses making over £10 billion or €10 billion in revenue, as larger enterprises are encountering more intricate risks. The announcement was made in London on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Resilience introduces Tech E&O for UK & EU firms, including £50m/€25m+ revenue clients. Cyber risk coverage offered to £/€10bn+ revenue businesses. SMEs worried about business interruption.

news.summary: Tokyo, April 10, 2025 - BeaconLink LLC, a telecom company in Tokyo, has introduced the JapanConnect eSIM Store. This online platform caters to international travelers in Japan, offering services in English. The store aims to provide convenient and cost-effective solutions for visitors.
news.headline: BeaconLink LLC. launches JapanConnect eSIM Store for international visitors in Japan, providing low prices and wide range of data plans.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, a new venture named Winnrz, developed by Idealz Holding, a prominent 'shop and win' company, is preparing to debut in the United Kingdom on May 12. This initiative aims to revolutionize the online shopping landscape in the UK by merging shopping pleasure with the excitement of potentially winning prizes. Idealz plans to introduce this concept to the UK market, promising a fresh and engaging shopping experience for customers.
news.headline: Winnrz, a new 'Shop and Win' online store by Idealz Holding, to launch in the UK on May 12, reshaping online shopping.

news.summary: CellPoint Digital, a leading provider of Payment Orchestration for airlines and travel businesses, revealed a new collaboration aimed at providing AI-driven payment optimization, worldwide acquiring services, and seamless transactions for travel brands. The partnership, announced on April 10, 2025, seeks to enhance payment processes and facilitate hassle-free transactions for companies in the travel industry. This initiative is expected to significantly improve operational efficiency and customer experience for travel brands by leveraging cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: CellPoint Digital partners with Checkout.com to enhance payment performance for travel merchants. AI-driven optimization and global acquiring.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on April 10, 2025, Seva Foundation is making a difference by empowering communities to fight preventable blindness, showcasing the effectiveness of sustainable eye care solutions. Public Television viewers can learn about the significant impact of this initiative and how it is changing lives.
news.headline: Seva Foundation empowers communities to combat preventable blindness, showing sustainable eye care solutions. Public TV shares impact.

news.summary: ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. (NYSE: ASX, TAIEX: 3711) based in Taipei, revealed its updated unaudited consolidated net revenues for March and the 1st quarter of 2025. The company, also known as ASEH, reported significant figures for the mentioned period. The consolidated net revenues for March showed growth sequentially compared to February and year-over-year. Specific numbers were not provided in the provided excerpt.
news.headline: ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. reports its monthly net revenues for March and 1st quarter of 2025, with specific figures undisclosed.

news.summary: Liberty Specialty Markets will be utilizing the Neuron platform for conducting live trading of Directors and Officers (D&O) as well as Cyber risks. This move signifies Liberty Specialty Markets embracing innovative technology to streamline and enhance their insurance operations. The platform will facilitate the efficient trading of these specific types of risks, improving the overall speed and accuracy of transactions. This adoption highlights Liberty Specialty Markets' commitment to staying ahead in the insurance industry by incorporating cutting-edge solutions.
news.headline: WTW's Neuron digital trading platform to be used by Liberty Specialty Markets for live trading of D&O and Cyber risks.

news.summary: A recent study has revealed that the global population has reached approximately 7.8 billion as of the current year. The research also indicates that the world's urban population is expected to rise to around 68% by 2050, reaching a total of about 6.7 billion people living in urban areas. In addition, the report highlights that over 55% of the global population currently resides in urban regions. The data suggests a significant trend towards urbanization in the coming decades.
news.headline: Goldman predicts weaker growth in China due to a 125% tariff on US imports.

news.summary: A well-known smart cleaning solutions brand, Tineco, is excited to reveal the revival of its Pop-Up Store in Paris. Running from April 23 to April 28, 2025, attendees can explore the brand's newest offerings such as the groundbreaking FLOOR ONE S9 Artist and S9 Artist Premium models. The event, located at Beaugrenelle Shopping Center, will feature interactive demonstrations for visitors to test out these state-of-the-art products firsthand.
news.headline: Tineco opens new Pop-Up Store in Paris showcasing FLOOR ONE S9 Artist and S9 Artist Premium; open from April 23-28, 2025 at Beaugrenelle Shopping Center.

news.summary: In March 2025, the VILVI Group achieved consolidated sales of EUR 23.26 million, marking a significant 24.6% increase from March 2024. For the period of January to March 2025, the Group's sales totaled EUR 71.06 million, reflecting a notable 26.6% increase compared to the corresponding period in the previous year. The VILVI Group is comprised of Vilkyškių pieninė AB, Modest AB, Kelmės pieninė AB, Kelmės pienas UAB, Pieno logistika AB, and Baltic Dairy Board SIA.
news.headline: VILVI Group's March 2025 sales: EUR 23.26 million, up by 24.6% from 2024. Q1 2025 sales reached EUR 71.06 million, a 26.6% increase year-over-year.
US delegation arrives for US-Russia talks at Russian consulate in Istanbul - Witness

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a year. The economy added a total of 537,000 jobs in the previous month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the average hourly earnings for workers increased by 0.4%, signaling potential wage growth in the coming months. This positive economic outlook has boosted consumer confidence and market optimism. The Federal Reserve is closely monitoring these developments as they consider their next steps in managing interest rates.
news.headline: Tesco predicts reduced profit due to tax increase and budget-conscious consumers.

news.summary: On April 9, crypto stocks surged in the US stock market following President Trump's 90-day pause on global tariffs. Michael Saylor's Strategy rose 24.76% to $296.86, and Coinbase climbed 17% to $177.09. Mining companies like MARA Holdings, Cipher Platforms, and Riot Platforms also saw gains. The S&P 500 closed 9.52% higher, one of its largest gains since World War II. Nasdaq 100 posted a 12.02% increase. APAC markets also saw gains, with Australia's ASX 200 up by 4.55% and Japan's Nikkei 225 up by almost 10%. Trump's tariff announcements in February and April triggered market volatility, with the US stock market losing $3.25 trillion on April 4, surpassing the entire crypto market's $2.68 trillion valuation. Bitcoin also experienced a 7.52% increase, trading at $82,065.
news.headline: Crypto stocks soared with US market revival on April 9 after Trump's tariff pause. Michael Saylor's Strategy rose 24.76% to $296.86, Coinbase (COIN) 17% to $177.09. MARA Holdings (MARA) up 17%, Cipher Platforms (CIFR) up 16.59%, and Riot Platforms (RIOT) rising 12.77%. S&P 500 closed 9.52% higher, Nasdaq 100 up 12.02%. APAC markets surged, Australia's ASX 200 up 4.55%, Japan's Nikkei 225 nearly 10% higher. Bitcoin trading 7.52% higher at $82,065.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Vaduz, Liechtenstein, Implantica AG (publ.), a leading MedTech firm focused on implementing cutting-edge technology inside the body, unveiled RefluxStop™, a one-of-a-kind device for addressing acid reflux. This device targets a significant market, with an estimated 1 billion individuals suffering from acid reflux.
news.headline: Implantica releases study on RefluxStop™ showing positive results in treating acid reflux, affecting over 1 billion people.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, SKF is set to release its Q1 2025 results on April 25 at around 07:30 (CEST). A webcast in English will follow at 09:00 (CEST) for investors, analysts, and media personnel. To participate, access the login portal at least 10 minutes before the scheduled time.

news.summary: OpenSea, a leading NFT marketplace, has requested the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to exempt NFT marketplaces from federal securities laws regulations. OpenSea's legal team emphasized that NFT marketplaces like theirs do not function as exchanges per US securities laws due to not executing transactions or acting as intermediaries. They have asked for informal guidance from the SEC, highlighting the need to clear up confusion in the industry. The SEC, in a notice on April 4, clarified that stablecoins meeting specific criteria are considered "non-securities." OpenSea's legal team also argued that NFT marketplaces should be exempt from registering as brokers since they do not provide investment advice or custody assets. The SEC, under the Trump administration, has started to relax its strict stance on crypto, dropping enforcement actions and probes against crypto firms, including OpenSea.
news.headline: OpenSea asks SEC to exclude NFT marketplaces from regulation as they don't meet exchange or broker criteria. SEC exempts stablecoins from transaction reports & memecoins from securities laws. OpenSea legal team requests informal guidance from SEC.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, CMB.TECH NV (traded on NYSE as CMBT and Euronext as CMBT) released its annual report for the year ended December 31, 2024, as required by Belgian law. The report is available on the Company’s website in the “Investors” section under “Annual and Financial Reports”.
news.headline: CMB.TECH releases annual report for year ended 12/31/2024, submits Form 20-F; listed on NYSE: CMBT & Euronext: CMBT.
